raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> my American Express Hilton card was charged for {$940.00} by XXXX CA XXXX. I did not authorize this purchase or give the merchant my card details. I also have not received anything from the merchant. I tried to initiate unauthorized charge dispute myself online via American Express self service tool, but it does not work. I also tried to chat with American Express customer service on XX/XX/year>, and XX/XX/year>, but during both interactions the customer service representative refused to do anything about the issue. Hopefully this complaint reaches someone at American Express that can actually do something about the fraudulent charges. I've attached my latest statement and a screenshot of the charge to make it easier to find.
